name: Spiced Pumpkin Bread in a Jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs, then add the pumpkin and water.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and ground cloves.
4. Gradually mix the dry ingredients into the pumpkin mixture until just combined.
5. Stir in the nuts.
6. Pour the batter into greased wide mouth pint jars, filling each jar about half full.
7. Place the jars on a baking sheet and bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
8. Once done, carefully remove each jar from the oven using an oven mitt.
9. Wipe any residue from the sealing edge of each jar with a paper towel.
10. Screw the caps back on tightly.
11. The heat will create a vacuum seal in the jars. Store them upright to ensure proper sealing.
12. Properly stored, this bread can last up to 1 year.
